title: ShulkerNbtFix
description: All shulkers are created equal: placed and unplaced
body:
## This mod fixes the Nbt data of a shulker box not being consistent between crafted and placed items.
### This mod is mainly to be used with [Carpet's](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) Stackable Shulkers, as this issue not noticeable in vanilla.

This mod has only been tested to work in 1.19+, though due to the simplicity of the code, it is likely to work on older versions.
